title: deer-flow.bead.filed v1
description: Bead creation broadcast from the gateway beads router. Fires on the success exit of create_bead; failed creations do not emit. Distinct from deer-flow.bead.enrichment.complete.v1 (post-enrichment) and bus.bead.created.v1 (file-watcher-based) — this is the request-handler boundary signal. Source: /deer-flow/gateway.

thread_id.description: thread_id of the source agent that filed the bead; null when filed by a human via API

target_repo.description: Repo the bead is filed against; null for same-repo as deer-flow

acceptance_summary.description: First 200 chars of acceptance criteria; full AC stays in bead DB
